Sex.description: Sex distribution of patients in each treatment group, a baseline variable that might affect patient prognosis.

Age.description: Mean age (with SD) of patients in each treatment group, a baseline variable that might affect patient prognosis.

Duration_of_pain.description: Mean duration of pain in weeks (with SD) in each treatment group, a baseline variable that might affect patient prognosis.

Pain_score.description: Median pain score at presentation (visual analogue scale, with range) in each treatment group, a baseline variable that might affect patient prognosis.

Radiological_abnormalities.description: Number (percentage) of patients with radiological abnormalities of the spine in each treatment group, a baseline variable that might affect patient prognosis.

Treatment_group.description: Treatment group assignment (Short-wave diathermy, Osteopathy, Placebo), the grouping factor for comparing baseline comparability.

Number_of_patients.description: Number of patients in each treatment group, used to contextualize the magnitude of baseline imbalances.
